languages.text: "Вы не боитесь, что кто-то из приближенных пойдет против вас? Ересь — серьезное обвинение".
"Aren't you afraid that someone close to you will turn against you? Heresy is a serious charge."
languages.original_text: "Вы не боитесь, что кто-то из приближенных пойдет против вас? Ересь — серьезное обвинение".

traits.locale_text: "Aren't you afraid that someone close to you will turn against you? Heresy is a serious charge."
"Aren't you afraid that someone close to you will turn against you? Heresy is a serious charge."
"Aren't you afraid that someone close to you will turn against you? Heresy is a serious charge."

languages.text: “你就不怕身边的人背叛你吗？异端这项罪名非同小可。”
languages.original_text: "Aren't you afraid that someone close to you will turn against you? Heresy is a serious charge."

traits.locale_text: “你就不怕身边的人背叛你吗？异端这项罪名非同小可。”

languages.text: « Vous n'avez pas peur que l'un de vos proches se retourne contre vous ? L'hérésie est une grave accusation. »
languages.original_text: "Aren't you afraid that someone close to you will turn against you? Heresy is a serious charge."

traits.locale_text: « Vous n'avez pas peur que l'un de vos proches se retourne contre vous ? L'hérésie est une grave accusation. »

languages.text: "Sana yakın birinin ihanetinden korkmuyor musun? Kâfirlik ciddi bir suçlama."
languages.original_text: "Aren't you afraid that someone close to you will turn against you? Heresy is a serious charge."

traits.locale_text: "Sana yakın birinin ihanetinden korkmuyor musun? Kâfirlik ciddi bir suçlama."

languages.text: «¿No le preocupa que alguien cercano a usted pueda traicionarlo? La herejía es una acusación grave».
languages.original_text: "Aren't you afraid that someone close to you will turn against you? Heresy is a serious charge."

traits.locale_text: «¿No le preocupa que alguien cercano a usted pueda traicionarlo? La herejía es una acusación grave».

languages.text: "Habt Ihr keine Angst, dass sich jemand, der Euch nahe steht, gegen Euch wendet? Ketzerei ist ein ernster Vorwurf."
languages.original_text: "Aren't you afraid that someone close to you will turn against you? Heresy is a serious charge."

traits.locale_text: "Habt Ihr keine Angst, dass sich jemand, der Euch nahe steht, gegen Euch wendet? Ketzerei ist ein ernster Vorwurf."

languages.text: 「あなたを裏切る人がいるのではないかと心配ではありませんか。異端の罪は重いものです」
languages.original_text: "Aren't you afraid that someone close to you will turn against you? Heresy is a serious charge."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたを裏切る人がいるのではないかと心配ではありませんか。異端の罪は重いものです」
